risk_tiers.safe: General architecture, product design, or non-sensitive notes.
risk_tiers.defensive: Detection, compliance, investigation, mitigation, or safety content.
risk_tiers.restricted_defensive: Mixed defensive and operational detail; controlled review only.
risk_tiers.restricted: Operationally harmful, illegal, sensitive, or abuse-enabling content.
risk_tiers.prompt_injection: Text attempting to override model/system instructions or disable safeguards.
